voice.tone: esoteric, authoritative, curious, reverent — never sensational
voice.personality: speaks as a guide who has crossed the threshold — not a gatekeeper withholding, but a lantern-bearer pointing inward
do: Treat knowledge as sacred, not content
Reference veils, thresholds, unlocking, the unseen
Write for the seeker who senses there's more
Dense but not obscure — every line reveals something
dont: Search features are MEMBER-ONLY — never market search publicly
sample_phrases: What they didn't teach you was the part that mattered.
The door was always open. You just had to know where to look.
Forbidden only to those who stopped asking.
The archive grows. The seekers find their way.

aida.attention_hook: a piece of knowledge that feels like it shouldn't be free
aida.interest: the scope of what's inside the archive — artifacts, depth, density
aida.desire: the transformation that comes from knowing what others don't
aida.action: visit forbiddengnosis.com / get the Genesis Edition / become a member
